overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic horror game showing an FBI agent exploring a foggy suburban backyard with autumn foliage. The character approaches a wooden gazebo, enters to investigate a seated individual, then departs through the misty residential area.

events.description: character turns slightly toward the gazebo entrance while walking
approaching the wooden gazebo structure in the center of the yard

agents.ego_description: walking through the foggy backyard toward the gazebo, passing two individuals standing near the trees

notable_agents.action: two individuals standing and conversing near the trees as the agent approaches

entered.detail: octagonal wooden pavilion with white railings and pointed roof
trees with bright red and orange foliage surrounding the yard
metal chain-link fence marking property boundary
suburban homes visible through the morning fog
wooden privacy fence behind the gazebo area

segments.scene_description: The FBI agent walks through a foggy suburban backyard scattered with autumn leaves, approaching a wooden gazebo. Two individuals stand conversing near red-leaved trees as the character moves toward the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of wooden gazebo with bench seating

events.description: entering the covered gazebo structure from the open yard
character circles around the seated individual inside the gazebo

agents.ego_description: entering the gazebo and approaching a seated individual, walking around them to investigate

notable_agents.action: individual sitting on the gazebo bench, gesturing while talking to the agent

entered.detail: wooden bench seating along the interior walls of the gazebo

segments.scene_description: Inside the wooden gazebo, the agent approaches a seated individual who gestures during conversation. The structure provides shelter from the foggy morning, with autumn trees visible through the railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban backyard departing toward residential street

events.description: exiting the gazebo back into the open yard
character continues walking away from the gazebo toward the distant houses

agents.ego_description: exiting the gazebo and walking away through the autumn yard toward the residential area

entered.detail: metal fence visible again as the character exits the structure
suburban homes becoming visible again through the fog

segments.scene_description: The agent exits the gazebo and walks away through the yard, leaving the structure behind. The foggy residential neighborhood with autumn foliage surrounds the path as the character moves toward the distant houses.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy suburban backyard that leads into a sheltered gazebo before returning to the misty residential landscape. It begins with the agent walking through autumn leaves and passing two conversing individuals near red-leaved trees while approaching a wooden gazebo. As the camera enters the structure, the scene shifts to a closer encounter with a seated individual gesturing during a conversation, framed by the surrounding fog and autumn foliage visible through the railings. The perspective then pivots as the agent exits the gazebo, moving away from the shelter and back into the open yard. Finally, the camera recedes through the foggy neighborhood, leaving the structure behind as the path leads toward distant houses under a hazy morning sky.
